agent.root_goal: Produce a bilingual (EN/DE) developer style guide for 'Halden', an internal smart-building automation platform, in two independently-owned parts. Facilities handbook rule, applying to the whole guide: documentation ships only if every point name, telemetry channel, and alarm code appearing anywhere in the guide matches the published canonical standard exactly; term drift between parts is a shipping defect.
